title: HTML Tokens, Error Recovery, Parser Selection, and Differential Evidence · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved crawl trace contains one plausible authorization, URL, robots, HTTP, decoding, parser, selector, frontier, concurrency, metadata, accessibility, privacy, export, browser, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded parser and tree-behavior comparison and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Distinguish source bytes, decoded text, tokens, parse errors, the constructed tree, serialized markup, and browser DOM state.
Predict omitted tags, mismatched nesting, duplicate attributes, character references, templates, foreign content, and recovery effects on target nodes.
Select html.parser, lxml HTML, lxml XML, or html5lib deliberately and pin that parser in code, tests, and metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Token Tree Model
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug site-quality team handles case 9520 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate malformed HTML recovery, explicit parser identity, script boundaries, and differential tree evidence; no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted; then replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-parser-differential-tgk9h0" that uses case 2532 to validate malformed HTML recovery, explicit parser identity, script boundaries, and differential tree evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-parser-differential-tgk9h0
# Competency: scraper-parser-differential.
# Case 2532: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted.
# Changed case: inject one retry, cancellation, queue, checkpoint, or output failure and recover cleanly.
def evidence_scraper_parser_differential_tgk9h0(fixtures: int = 18, tokenized: int = 18, compared_parsers: int = 4, explained_differences: int = 7, executed_scripts: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_tgk9h0 = "tgk9h0-0h9kgt-2532"
    assert evidence_variant_tgk9h0
    evidence_axes_tgk9h0 = (
        "authorizationtgk9h0",
        "url2532",
        "response0h9kgt",
        "treetgk9h02532",
        "frontier2532tgk9h0",
        "report0h9kgt2532",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_tgk9h0)) == 6
    if fixtures < 8 or tokenized < 0:
        return False, tokenized, "parser-fixtures"
    if tokenized != fixtures:
        return False, tokenized, "parse-reconciliation"
    if compared_parsers < 3 or explained_differences < 3:
        return False, compared_parsers, "parser-differential"
    if executed_scripts > 0:
        return False, executed_scripts, "script-execution"
    assert tokenized == fixtures and executed_scripts == 0
    return True, explained_differences, "explicit-parser-model"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.
